title: asperula bracteata
intro: Asperula bracteata, also known as Wood Sorrel, is a perennial herb belonging to the gentian family. It has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its astringent and anti-inflammatory effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The plant's health benefits include aiding in digestion, relieving gastrointestinal problems, and exhibiting antimicrobial properties. Asperula bracteata can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is often used in herbal remedies to address digestive issues and promote overall well-being.
